name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
note: CONFIRMED REAL — this is not a mix-up. Model id claude-sonnet-4-6. Direct predecessor to Claude Sonnet 5, sitting between Sonnet 4.5 and Sonnet 5 in the lineage; the corpus is missing it even though it already has both Opus 4.6 (2026-02-05) and Sonnet 5 (2026-06-30). Introduced 1M-token context (beta) and adaptive thinking for the Sonnet line.

results.notes: Essentially tied with Opus 4.6's 72.7% at launch. See proposed-slug note on the Opus 4.8 entry.
Max-effort configuration; scored 60.4% at high effort (120k thinking budget).
From the later Sonnet 5 launch comparison table, re-measured alongside Sonnet 5 and Opus 4.8.
Terminal-Bench 2.1, Terminus-2 harness; a separate press report gave 59.1% for what it called 'Terminal-Bench 2.0' at launch, which may reflect a different bench version or harness.
Third-party recap of an Anthropic-reported figure; could not directly confirm the exact number against the primary system card text, so treat with reduced confidence.

verificationNotes: Release date confirmed via Anthropic's own announcement (fetched directly; page states February 17, 2026, though one press recap gave February 15 — treated the primary source as authoritative). SWE-bench/OSWorld figures below are from direct launch-day press coverage citing Anthropic's numbers; GPQA figure is from a third-party recap with lower confidence.
